name: Moise Bus Svc
recent_news: No recent M&A or news identified. Listed as small unclaimed local charter/school bus service in North Miami Beach.
fit_notes: Sub-scale single-operator (est. 1-3 buses, ~$45K-$168K revenue). Too small to be a meaningful Summit tuck-in on its own; only relevant if rolled up with other Miami-Dade micro-operators.

name: Smart Kids School Bus Broward
districts_or_customers: Broward County / Hialeah area private school transportation
recent_news: Related FL entity 'Smart Kids School Buses Corp' (P04000138870) operating; related 'Smart Kids Transport Inc' was administratively dissolved 2005. Owner Elsie Abdala is age ~76, suggesting potential succession opportunity.
fit_notes: Tiny South Florida operator with elderly owner-principal — succession angle is real, but scale (1-5 buses) is sub-threshold for a direct Summit tuck-in unless aggregated with other South Florida micro-operators.

name: Dworak Bus Svc
owner_or_parent: independent (DBA of Dworak Motor Company Inc, DOT #366969)
districts_or_customers: Kewaunee School District (lost contract — service ended for 2024-25 school year)
recent_news: 2024: Kewaunee School District signed Lamers Bus Lines as transportation provider after Dworak declined to bid, ending Dworak's continuous service since 1939. District is consolidating transport in-house.
fit_notes: Effectively exited school-bus business in 2024 after losing flagship Kewaunee SD contract (held since 1939) to Lamers. Century-old family business is winding down operations — NOT an attractive tuck-in: no contracted route revenue, no district customer. Possibly asset purchase only (buses/yard).

name: Cragle Bus Svc
districts_or_customers: Likely Northwest Area School District (Shickshinny / Luzerne County) — not directly confirmed
recent_news: No M&A, news, or web footprint identified. Operates as a small rural Luzerne County route carrier.
fit_notes: Sub-scale single-route/single-operator likely serving Northwest Area SD. Too small to move the needle as a Summit tuck-in unless bundled with multiple Luzerne/Columbia County micro-contractors.

name: Millennium Limousine
recent_news: No web footprint as a school-bus or student-transportation operator identified. Name and CPUC-style profile indicate limousine/livery business, not a yellow-bus contractor.
fit_notes: Out of scope — appears to be a CPUC-regulated limousine/livery operator, not a school-bus or student-transportation contractor. The 'special_needs=1' flag in the source data likely reflects ad-hoc livery work, not SPED routing. Not a Summit tuck-in target.
